name: Restaurant Casa Aladdin
quote: Located at the Northeast end of the main square, you'll find this multi-story restaurant that serves up amazing Moroccan dishes. Once at the top, you'll have the main square of Chefchaouen's Medina in front of you (where you can hear live music) and the blue cities stacked houses behind you.
article_title: Where to Eat in Chefchaouen, Morocco

name: Restaurant Bab Ssour
quote: Located not too far away from Restaurant Casa Aladdin, you'll find Restaurant Bab Ssour — tucked away, down a side alley, leaving it to be not as crowded as the restaurants you'll walk past in the main square. Our favorite restaurant in Chefchaouen and it should not be missed by you.
article_title: Where to Eat in Chefchaouen, Morocco

name: Mester Juices at Veranda Cafe
quote: Mester Juices is located on the Northeastern side of the main square of Chefchaouen tucked behind the main café fronts — a Chefchaouen rooftop cafe with fresh juice and scoops of ice cream.
article_title: Where to Eat in Chefchaouen, Morocco
